values.value: Store__c:store; Status:quoteStatus; Pyxis_Quote_Expiration_Date__c:quoteExpirationDate; ExternalQuoteNumber__c:quoteNumber; InternalMessageCreatedDate__c:internalMessageCreatedDate; InternalMessageCreatedBy_LDAP__c:internalMessageCreatedBy; InternalMessageText__c:internalMessageText; CreationChannel__c:creationChannel; StatePyxis__c:state; CreatedDatePixys__c:createdDate; LDAPcreatedByUser__c:createdByUser
